projects.title: Walker for NABIP VP Campaign
projects.roi: Voter re-engagement and user database retentione
projects.desc: Strategic digital campaign platform, visual identity, and member engagement portal for the NABIP Vice Presidential campaign.
projects.fullDesc:
Campaign Strategy & Digital Literature Portal

Keep Walking with Walker is a nationwide advocacy and leadership campaign for the National Association of Benefits and Insurance Professionals (NABIP). Intermaven architected a bold, mobile-first campaign platform, digital manifesto, member video hub, and election pledge system built for maximum voter mobilization.

Key Project Deliverables

  • Executive Brand Identity: High-trust presidential visual design system, typography, and advocacy graphics.
  • Voter Engagement Engine: Interactive policy platform, endorsement portal, and event tracking interface.
  • High-Performance Infrastructure: Built for multi-device speed, accessibility, and high-volume grassroots engagement on using WordPress CMS for the content management

images.caption: Keep Walking with Walker — Live Campaign Hero Portal

projects.title: Atlanta TV Mount PRO
projects.desc: Live quote calculation and booking web application engineered for home services, featuring automated customer scheduling.
projects.fullDesc:
Executive Summary

Atlanta TV Mount PRO is an automated web platform designed to streamline high-velocity home service bookings across the greater Atlanta metropolitan area.

Key System Features

  • Instant Online Estimator: Real-time price calculation based on screen size, mount type, and wall surface material.
  • Automated Scheduling: Direct calendar integration with immediate SMS and email customer confirmations.
  • Mobile-Optimized UX: Ultra-responsive mobile booking flow tailored for local search conversion.

images.caption: Focused Brand Identity & Graphical Logo Header
Full Platform Hero Showcase & Live Booking Interface
Instant Quote Calculator & Feature Package Options

projects.title: TuneMavens Platform
projects.desc: Sync licensing platform built for music rights holders and catalog managers.
projects.fullDesc:
Executive Summary

TuneMavens provides music rights holders with automated catalog management, sync placement tracking, and royalty distribution workflows.

Technical Architecture

  • Acoustic fingerprinting engine for automatic track detection.
  • Instant licensing agreement generator.
  • Multi-currency payout gateway.

faq.question: How long does a typical studio project take?
faq.answer: Standard brand identity & web projects complete in 3 to 5 weeks. Custom software ecosystems range from 6 to 10 weeks depending on SOW scope.

faq.question: Do we receive full ownership of source code and design files?
faq.answer: Yes. Upon final invoice settlement, all custom design files, Figma components, and source code are assigned 100% to your company.

faq.question: How do Intermaven Network Credits work?
faq.answer: Intermaven Network Credits allow clients to self-serve automated CRM pipelines, AI node execution, and landing page generators on intermaven.io.

profile_cms.name: Marcus Sterling
profile_cms.title: Founder & Executive Technology Partner
profile_cms.tagline: Architecting high-trust software ecosystems, resilient cloud infrastructure, and proprietary venture platforms.
profile_cms.bio: Marcus Sterling is a veteran software architect and technology entrepreneur with over two decades of technical leadership experience. He specializes in designing enterprise-grade software systems, scalable cloud microservices, and AI-driven automation workflows.
profile_cms.philosophy: We believe in high-trust digital craftsmanship — building software that scales reliably without technical debt or unnecessary complexity.
